General.Name: Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co Ltd
General.GicIndustry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
General.Description: Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Limited generates gas-fired power and heat energy, wind power, photovoltaic power, and hydropower in Mainland China and internationally. As of December 31, 2024, it had an installed capacity of 17,437 megawatt (MW), including eight gas-fired cogeneration plants with an installed capacity of 4,775 MW; wind power generation capacity of 6,858 MW; photovoltaic power generation installed capacity of 5,268 MW; and hydropower installed capacity of 310 MW. The company also offers repair and maintenance; investment management; and finance leasing services. In addition, it sells electricity to local grid companies. The company was formerly known as Beijing Jingneng Energy Technology Investment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Limited in August 2010. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Beijing, the People' Republic of China. Beijing Jingneng Clean Energy Co., Limited operates as a subsidiary of Beijing Energy Holding Co.,Ltd.
